name: Checkmark
description: Bold check-marks ticking a new way on every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(40% 70%, 82% 18%, 94% 30%, 42% 92%, 8% 58%, 20% 46%); clip-path: polygon(40% 70%, 82% 18%, 94% 30%, 42% 92%, 8% 58%, 20% 46%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
